Title: Test user creation with valid data
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page
2. Enter the email and password
3. Click the "Sign Up" button
Expected Result:
- The user is created successfully
- The user is logged in
- The user's data is stored in the database

---

Title: Test user creation with invalid email
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page
2. Enter the invalid email and password
3. Click the "Sign Up" button
Expected Result:
- An error message is displayed
- The user is not created
- The user is not logged in

---

Title: Test user creation with invalid password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page
2. Enter the valid email and short password
3. Click the "Sign Up" button
Expected Result:
- An error message is displayed
- The user is not created
- The user is not logged in

---

Title: Test user login with valid data
Test Steps:

2. Enter the email and password
3. Click the "Log In" button
Expected Result:
- The user is logged in
- The user is redirected to the dashboard

- The mission is stored in the database

Title: Test user completion of mission
Preconditions: User has been created and a mission has been created
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the mission page
2. Click the "Complete Mission" button for the specified mission
Expected Result:
- The mission status is updated to "Superato"
- The user's point value is updated
- The user's mission completion history is updated

---

Title: Test user incomplete mission
Preconditions: User has been created and a mission has been created
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the mission page
2. Click the "Incomplete Mission" button for the specified mission
Expected Result:
- The mission status is updated to "Non Superato"
- The user's point value is not updated
- The user's mission completion history is updated

---

Title: Test user view of completed missions
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user dashboard
2. Click the "Completed Missions" tab
Expected Result:
- The user's completed missions are displayed
- The missions' titles, descriptions, and statuses are visible

---

Title: Test user view of incomplete missions
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user dashboard
2. Click the "Incomplete Missions" tab
Expected Result:
- The user's incomplete missions are displayed
- The missions' titles, descriptions, and statuses are visible

---

Title: Test real-time data updates
Preconditions: User has been created and a mission has been created
Test Steps:
1. Create a new user and mission
2. Update the user's data or mission's data
3. Verify that the updates are reflected in real-time
Expected Result:
- The updates are reflected in real-time for all connected clients

---

Title: Test error handling for real-time data updates
Preconditions: User has been created and a mission has been created
Test Steps:
1. Create a new user and mission
2. Simulate a network error during data update
3. Verify that the error is handled gracefully and the data is not lost
Expected Result:
- The error is handled gracefully
- The data is not lost
- The user is notified of the error

---

Title: Test mission listener functionality
Preconditions: User has been created and a mission has been created
Test Steps:
1. Register a mission listener
2. Verify that the listener is triggered when the mission data changes
3. Verify that the listener receives the updated mission data
Expected Result:
- The listener is triggered when the mission data changes
- The listener receives the updated mission data

---

Title: Test mission listener error handling
Preconditions: User has been created and a mission has been created
Test Steps:
1. Register a mission listener
2. Simulate a network error during data update
3. Verify that the error is handled gracefully and the listener is notified
Expected Result:
- The error is handled gracefully
- The listener is notified of the error

---

Title: Test token control and retrieval
Preconditions: User has been created and a mission has been created
Test Steps:
1. Verify that the token is controlled and retrieved correctly
2. Verify that the token is used for data updates
Expected Result:
- The token is controlled and retrieved correctly
- The token is used for data updates

---

Title: Test token error handling
Preconditions: User has been created and a mission has been created
Test Steps:
1. Simulate a token error during data update
2. Verify that the error is handled gracefully and the data is not lost
Expected Result:
- The error is handled gracefully
- The data is not lost
- The user is notified of the error
